title: Bobby1545
description: This mod is a bobby1545 mod for 1.12.2. This mod brings tools such as black_adam void multitool and inventory reset bar to the game, as well as adding an effect called bobbykilling potion and much more
body: This mod is a bobby1545 mod for 1.12.2. This mod brings tools such as black_adam void multitool and inventory reset bar to the game, as well as adding an effect called bobbykilling potion. This effect creates lightning, then you cannot move, and when the effect is over, you die, so you have no escape from this effect yet. Version 1 may not be very satisfying for this reason, but you will thank me when new versions of this mod start to arrive.
